violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in the kitchen was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Call to service was placed during the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Lobster meat was observed thawing inside of the walk-in cooler with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood products packaged in ROP shall be removed from original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed at 32 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from original packaging during the time of inspection. Proper thawing procedures reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
